history.subject: RR χ-ledger N15/N16: k-dimension ledger (coboundary/H¹ as k-vector spaces, χ:=ℓ-h¹), 4-term exact-sequence alternating dimension identity, χ-additivity χ(D')=χ(D)+dim(𝒜(D')/𝒜(D)) gated on the ledger exact sequence, and Riemann inequality deg D + χ(0) ≤ ℓ(D) via i(D)≥0

N5 cocycle layer: product-typed Cech differentials d01/d12 with componentwise coface formulas, restriction calculus (trans/self/injective/iso) for the opens poset, and the overlap 1-cocycle q ↦ (0,q,−q,0) with its 8-index cocycle proof (kernel membership in d¹)

N5 kernel half: ker d¹ = {(0,q,−q,0)} — diagonal components vanish, off-diagonal r = −q, and the k-linear equivalence overlapKerEquiv : Γ(U₁⊓U₂,F) ≃ₗ ker d¹ via the overlap cocycle and the (0,1)-projection

N5 CLOSED (unconditional): cechCohomology(2-cover, deg 1) ≃ₗ H1Cok via ker d¹/im d⁰ — pair lift/proj section of Č⁰, d⁰∘pair = −overlap cocycle of sectionDiff, range identification κ(im sectionDiff) = im toCycles, homology assembled through isoSc'+moduleCatHomologyIso; N6 corollary hModuleOneEquivH1Cok under the HasCechToHModuleIso gate

N12 consumable (gated): genus finiteness Module.Finite k H¹(C,𝒪_C) from HasFiniteMapToP1 + P1HasLaurentChartData + HasExt + ∀-cover HasCechToHModuleIso, composing the N11 keystone with the N5+N6 comparison; Cokernel header updated to record the landed N5 identification

Register wave-7 modules: NonconstantToP1 (gate reduction to ExistsNonconstantMapToProjInt with the k-lift bridge proved) and GenusFiniteness (the gated N12 consumable: Module.Finite k H^1(C,O_C) under the finite-map + chart-data + Cech-comparison gates). Full build green (8684 jobs).
ℙ¹ chart-ring span step 2 algebraic core: transport (𝒜0=ℤ)-span through any ring hom into k-span (awayRingHom_mem_span_pow)

Serre D1: finite sections on affine/projective charts (Stacks 01PC); D2/D3 trivialised twisted extension & vanishing via the qcqs global-section localisation on a projective (proper hence qcqs) total space

Schematic-support descent brick F ≅ i_* i^*F: the closed-immersion adjunction unit is an iso whenever I(U) ⊆ Ann Γ(F,U) (affine-locally via the QCoh section formula + surjective-presentation tensor heart); at I = Ann F this is the support descent with i^*F finitely presented
N14: residue-field embedding ι completes local-step ≤ deg P; order surjectivity + N15 one-step χ-bound χ(D+P) ≤ χ(D)+deg P
